posts.author: I-am-Orlando
posts.title: SAVE AMERICA ACT

posts.raw_content:
70k for a vehicle, any vehicle, is beyond the mainstream's ability to purchase.

Yes, some pay outrageous notes to have these vehicles and others.  But for the average person a $1,500 car note simply does not work.

What Ford Should do...

-Using the Godzilla create a downsized version in the 5.7-6.0 liter range.

-Build a retro truck off the 1993-96 body with current frame and front suspension

-Updated dash board, with blue tooth and DOT required airbags

-limit all other options

-vinyl mat floors only

-optional front bucket seats or bench

-x cab w/ 6.5 box or 4 door w/ 5.5 box, only options

-steel wheels only

-4 wd only

-v-8 only

-ac  but no climate control/ power windows, locks / no radio, empty double DIN mounting location, but speaker locations pre wired

-Knobs not screen buttons, make everything possible mechanical rather than digital

-1.5" lift over standard.

-maybe 3 color choices

keep it as cheap as possible.  under 40k would be a sweet spot in the market.


EDIT:  NO IDLE STOP OR CYLINDER DEACTIVATION!!!!!!
